description: bnn baseline — natal chart only, no moment-of-reading parameter (script has no clock dependency at all).

chart_path.description: Same pinned birth chart, entered as a hand-authored pasted chart instead of ephemeris inputs, expanded via lib/chart_io.py --mode parashari and fed to the baseline via --chart. Only chart_meta.ayanamsa.mode/value_dms differ from the ephemeris-path snapshot (pasted charts don't carry an ayanamsa value).
